channel.title: SettleWire
channel.description: Prediction markets news: regulation, volume, deals and data.

item.title: Michigan extends Kalshi sports contract ban, sets Aug. 12 geofence deadline
item.description: Michigan regulators have extended their prohibition on Kalshi's sports event contracts and ordered the platform to geofence the state by August 12, giving the company additional time to comply.

item.title: Kalshi, Polymarket Face Core Legal Question: Gambling or Finance?
item.description: Bloomberg Law News examines the central regulatory debate over whether US prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket constitute legal financial instruments or illegal gambling under American law.

item.title: Cboe Expands Options Hours and Prediction Markets to Diversify Revenue
item.description: Cboe Global Markets is broadening its business into prediction markets and extended options trading hours, according to a Yahoo Finance analysis examining whether these moves redefine the exchange operator's diversification strategy.

item.title: Kalshi World Cup odds now surface inside ChatGPT via OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI has begun displaying Kalshi's prediction-market odds for the FIFA World Cup directly within ChatGPT, giving the regulated event-contract exchange a high-visibility distribution channel for the first time.

item.title: Gondor v1 launches Polymarket portfolio borrowing for prediction-market positions
item.description: Gondor v1, a new DeFi protocol, will allow Polymarket users to use their entire prediction-market portfolio as collateral for loans, unlocking liquidity without forcing position exits.

item.title: Kalshi Home Run Derby market opens with Schwarber as frontrunner
item.description: Kalshi has launched a Home Run Derby prediction market listing Kyle Schwarber as the odds-on favorite to win the 2025 MLB All-Star event.

item.title: Polymarket odds on CLARITY Act drop as Trump pushes China urgency
item.description: Polymarket contract odds on passage of the CLARITY Act fell sharply even as President Trump publicly pressured Congress with warnings about China competition, signaling trader skepticism about near-term legislative success.

item.title: Kalshi Launches Advanced Trading Terminal for Event Contracts
item.description: Kalshi introduced a new advanced trading terminal in 2025, giving event-contract traders a more sophisticated interface with enhanced tools for executing and managing positions on its prediction markets platform.

item.title: Michael Burry calls prediction markets gambling, regardless of framing
item.description: Michael Burry, the investor famous for predicting the 2008 housing collapse, publicly dismissed prediction markets as gambling in name only, according to Business Insider.

item.title: Polymarket Opens Michigan Governor Race Odds to Public Bettors
item.description: Polymarket has launched a prediction market on the 2026 Michigan gubernatorial race, allowing traders worldwide to stake positions on which candidate will win the governorship.

item.title: Kalshi Pro Trading Terminal Targets High-Volume Prediction Market Users
item.description: Kalshi is launching a professional trading terminal designed for its most active prediction market traders, according to a report by qz.com.

item.title: Kalshi secures $30M investment from ETF XOVR in prediction market bet
item.description: ETF issuer XOVR committed $30 million to prediction market exchange Kalshi as a private market investment, expanding its strategy of backing high-growth alternative asset firms.

item.title: Kalshi Pro Launches Multi-Market Dashboard for Active Traders
item.description: Kalshi has officially launched Kalshi Pro, a new platform tier designed for high-volume traders who simultaneously manage positions across multiple event-contract markets.

item.title: LA Therapists Report Rise in Youth Gambling Tied to Kalshi
item.description: Los Angeles-area therapists are reporting an increase in young patients presenting with gambling problems, and they are pointing to prediction-markets platform Kalshi as a contributing factor.

item.title: Kalshi Pro launches multi-market trading and perpetual futures for power users
item.description: Kalshi launched a new 'Pro' product, reported by CNBC, giving sophisticated users the ability to trade multiple prediction markets simultaneously alongside perpetual futures contracts.

item.title: Ninth Circuit grills Kalshi on sports contracts vs. betting in tribal lands appeal
item.description: A Ninth Circuit panel pressed Kalshi lawyers in oral arguments to explain why its sports event contracts differ legally from sports betting under the Indian Gaming Regulatory Act in a tribal lands appeal.

item.title: Ninth Circuit hears Kalshi tribal gaming classification dispute
item.description: The Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals took up a legal challenge examining whether Kalshi's event contracts constitute tribal gaming activity, in a case with sweeping implications for prediction market regulation.

item.title: Gibraltar launches world's first dedicated prediction markets regulatory framework
item.description: Gibraltar became the first jurisdiction globally to establish a standalone regulatory regime exclusively for prediction markets, creating a bespoke licensing framework separate from existing gambling or financial-services rules.

item.title: Polymarket 'ROCKY' referral code extended through MLB All-Star Game
item.description: Polymarket has extended its $50 referral promotion using code 'ROCKY' through the MLB All-Star Game, according to Rocky Top Insider.

item.title: Kalshi wins right to block Michigan users by address, not geofence
item.description: A court ruling allows Kalshi to enforce its Michigan user ban through address-based verification rather than GPS geofencing, a significant compliance method distinction for the prediction-markets platform.

item.title: Tribal gaming leader warns prediction markets threaten sovereign casino revenues
item.description: James Siva, a tribal gaming advocate, warned in a Tribal Business News Q&A that the rapid expansion of regulated prediction markets poses a direct competitive threat to Native American tribal casino operations.

item.title: Kalshi disputes think tank claims users lose millions to pro traders
item.description: Kalshi is publicly contesting allegations from a think tank asserting that retail users suffer significant losses when trading against professional market makers on the prediction platform.

item.title: Kalshi-Spotify Partnership Collapses in Public Dispute
item.description: Prediction markets platform Kalshi and Spotify ended their promotional partnership in a messy, public falling-out, according to a Garbage Day report published recently.

item.title: Kalshi legitimacy guide targets new prediction market users in 2026
item.description: MLive.com published a consumer explainer in 2026 assessing whether Kalshi is safe and legitimate, aimed at first-time prediction market participants considering the regulated U.S. exchange.

item.title: Corporate Crackdown Targets Prediction Markets Amid Explosive Growth
item.description: Prediction markets are experiencing rapid expansion in 2025, but companies and institutions have begun restricting employee participation, signaling a new wave of corporate resistance to the sector, according to Inc.com.

item.title: Kalshi Expands Perpetual Contracts as World Cup Markets Set Volume Records
item.description: Kalshi has launched an expanded perpetuals product line while World Cup event contracts have driven prediction-market trading volumes to new highs, according to TradingView.

item.title: Midterm Election Contracts Top $200M in Prediction Market Volume
item.description: Traders on prediction markets have collectively wagered nearly $200 million on 2026 U.S. midterm election outcomes, according to NBC News.

item.title: Prediction Markets Expand From Elections to Love Island and Gold
item.description: Prediction markets have broadened sharply beyond political forecasting into entertainment and commodities contracts, including reality TV outcomes and precious metals prices, according to a new PYMNTS.com analysis.

item.title: Italy re-blocks Polymarket, prediction market back on banned list
item.description: Italian regulators have added Polymarket to the country's blocked-site list for a second time, cutting off access to the U.S.-based prediction market platform for users in Italy.

item.title: Polymarket launches $50 deposit-match promos tied to World Cup quarterfinals
item.description: Polymarket is running partner-specific $50 bonus promotions in July 2025, requiring a $20 deposit and unique promo codes, targeting prediction-market activity around 2026 World Cup quarterfinal matches and political events.
